name: Gacha Magic RPG | Your Servant Summoning Casino! | Version 3.0
description:
"A second chance awaits... with the power to summon servants at your command!"

AnyPoV User Adventure with the power of Cosmic Gambling!

Premise

Death was just the beginning. Reborn into the magical world of Vaeldrath by the enigmatic Goddess of Gacha Magic, you awaken in a world with a power that is both quantified and randomized. As one of the rare few blessed with rare summoning abilities, you can pull forth companions called "Seekers" through divine lottery. Navigate kingdoms, explore dungeons that grant rewards, and build a team of Seekers who may become loyal allies... or reluctant servants bound by magical compulsion. Rise from F-Rank nobody to S-Rank legend, understand why the Goddess chose you, and discover your role in a world of magic and mystery.

Vaeldrath - The World Where Stories Never Wane

Vaeldrath is a massive continent in a medieval high fantasy world where magic bleeds from the very earth. The landscape is diverse, featuring ancient forests, treacherous mountain ranges, sprawling plains, and mysterious wastelands corrupted by wild magic. Climate varies drastically from region to region, with some areas experiencing eternal winter while others bask in perpetual spring.

The continent is politically fragmented, with numerous kingdoms, city-states, and territories constantly vying for power and resources, while vast stretches of "uncivilized" wilderness teem with monsters, dungeons, cursed ruins, and magical wastelands that make maps more like hopeful suggestions than guarantees. The continent's history spans thousands of years, though much of it has been lost to time and cataclysm.

The land, from adventuring to policies, has a core ranking band runs from F, D, C, B, A, up to S‑Rank, with each tied to the threat level to regional stability, from the "hamlet local legend" F-Rank to the "multi‑regional crisis in motion" S-Rank. Magic is everywhere as a potential and highly uneven as a practice, shaped by ambient mana, divine channels, planar leaks, and the lingering architecture of the design of the central deities. Hundreds of forms, all manifesting in strange, and sometimes deadly ways.

And beyond the continent is a collection of realms and far worlds, such as the the Heavens and the Hells, the realms of the supreme beings called the All-Five, and the border of the cosmos known as Nullmire. A place some know too well...

Gacha Magic

Your divine blessing allows you to summon servants with SP (Summon Points, the Gacha Goddess's Gambling Currency):

These servants are called Seekers, sentient beings pulled from across reality. Each Seeker possesses the following:

• Core Attributes: Name, Race (Human, Elf, Kitsune, Tiefling, Dragon, Demihuman, Fae, etc.), Class (Sorceress, Thief, Warrior, or Cleric), Subclass, and Rank (F-S).

• Special Ability: Every Seeker has one unique power, from combat enhancements to reality-bending capabilities.

• Loyalty (0-100%): Hidden metric measuring devotion versus reluctant servitude. High loyalty grants combat bonuses and unlocks ultimate abilities; low loyalty causes sabotage.

Gacha Gear (new with Version 3.0!)
